Revision of Risk Weights for Residential Housing Loans

DBR.No.BP.BC.83/21.04.048/2023-24

January 15, 2024

The Reserve Bank of India, in exercise of its powers conferred under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, hereby advises all Scheduled Commercial Banks (excluding RRBs and SFBs) to revise the risk weights applicable to residential housing loans.

After a review, it has been decided to revise the risk weights for individual housing loans as under:

  • Loans up to Rs. 30 lakh: 35% (from 50%)
  • Loans above Rs. 30 lakh and up to Rs. 75 lakh: 50% (from 75%)
  • Loans above Rs. 75 lakh: 75% (from 100%)

These directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
